svg.script: document.querySelectorAll('[id^="slide01_foglie"]').forEach((e,t)=>{e.style.transformOrigin="16px 11px",e.style.transformBox="fill-box";let r=()=>{let t=2e3+parseInt(2e3*Math.random());e.animate([{transform:"skew(0deg) rotate(0deg)"},{transform:"skew(4deg) rotate(4deg)"},{transform:"skew(0deg) rotate(0deg)"}],{duration:t,iterations:1,easing:"ease-in-out"}),setTimeout(r,t+parseInt(1e3*Math.random()))};r()}),document.querySelectorAll('[id^="slide01_backfoglie"]').forEach((e,t)=>{e.style.transformOrigin="center",e.style.transformBox="fill-box";let r=()=>{let t=2e3+parseInt(2e3*Math.random());e.animate([{transform:"skew(0deg) rotate(0deg)"},{transform:"skew(1deg) rotate(1deg)"},{transform:"skew(0deg) rotate(0deg)"}],{duration:t,iterations:1,easing:"ease-in-out"}),setTimeout(r,t+parseInt(1e3*Math.random()))};r()});
